reference: Your daughter needs to see a neurologist on an urgent basis. She could be exhibiting symptoms of a chronic infection of the central nervous system, seizures, damage from an earlier medical problem, a lesion in the spinal cord, problems with blood flow to the brain, or any number of other reasons for these serious observations.
text: Your daughter needs to see a neurologist on an urgent basis. She could be exhibiting symptoms of a chronic infection of the central nervous system, seizures, damage from an earlier medical problem, a lesion in the spinal cord, problems with blood flow to the brain, or any number of other reasons for these serious observations.
